title: Japanese-Style Grilled Chicken
description: A fusion of Japanese flavors with Peruvian-style grilled chicken. Marinated in soy sauce, sake, and mirin, this dish is perfect for a summer evening.

ingredients.name: Chicken Pollo a la Brasa (grilled chicken)

instructions: In a blender or food processor, combine soy sauce, sake, mirin, ginger, and garlic. Blend until smooth.
Place the chicken in a large zip-top plastic bag or a shallow dish. Pour the marinade over the chicken and massage to coat.
Refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Remove the chicken from the marinade and grill for 5-7 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Let the chicken rest for 5 minutes before slicing.
Serve with green onions and additional marinade, if desired.
